contentBlocks.original:
शुक्लां ब्रह्मविचारसारपरमामाद्यां जगद्व्यापिनीं
वीणापुस्तकधारिणीमभयदां जाड्यान्धकारापहाम् ।
हस्ते स्फाटिकमालिकां च दधतीं पद्मासने संस्थितां
वन्दे तां परमेश्वरीं भगवतीं बुद्धिप्रदां शारदाम् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ṣuklām Brahma-Vicāra-Sāra-Paramām-āadyām Jagad-Vyāpinīm
Vīnnā-Pustaka-ḍhārinnīm-ābhaya-ḍām Jāddya-āndhakāra-āpahām |
ḥaste Sphāttika-ṃālikām Ca ḍadhatīm Padma-āsane Samsthitām
Vande ṭām Parame[a-īi]śvarīm Bhagavatīm Buddhi-Pradām ṣāradām ||
contentBlocks.translation: (I meditate on devi Sharada) who is pure white in colour, and whose deepest essence can only be fathomed by enquiring into the nature of brahman (absolute consciousness); who is supreme and primeval, and her essence is spread across the whole universe (as consciousness), who is holding the veena (symbolising the essence of music) and book (symbolising the essence of knowledge), and displaying the gesture of fearlessness (arising out of knowledge); the knowledge which removes the darkness of ignorance from our minds, who is holding a garland of crystal beads in her hand (shining with purity), and who is sitting on the lotus (blooming like an awakened consciousness), I extol and worship her, who is the supreme goddess who awakens our intelligence; I worship devi Sharada.
contentBlocks.meanings: शुक्लां (śuklām) – white; ब्रह्मविचारसारपरमाम् (brahmavicārasāraparamām) – essence of Brahman inquiry (brahma:Brahman | vicāra:inquiry | sāra:essence | paramām:supreme); आद्यां (ādyām) – primeval; जगद्व्यापिनीं (jagadvyāpinīm) – pervading the universe (jagat:universe | vyāpinīm:pervading); वीणापुस्तकधारिणीम् (vīṇāpustakadhāriṇīm) – holding veena and book (vīṇā:veena | pustaka:book | dhāriṇīm:holding); अभयदां (abhayadām) – granting fearlessness (abhaya:fearlessness | dām:granting); जाड्यान्धकारापहाम् (jāḍyāndhakārāpahām) – removing darkness of ignorance (jāḍya:ignorance | andhakāra:darkness | āpahām:removing); हस्ते (haste) – in hand; स्फाटिकमालिकां (sphāṭikamālikām) – crystal garland (sphāṭika:crystal | mālikām:garland); च (ca) – and; दधतीं (dadhatīm) – holding; पद्मासने (padmāsane) – on lotus seat (padma:lotus | āsane:seat); संस्थितां (saṃsthitām) – situated; वन्दे (vande) – I worship; तां (tām) – her; परमेश्वरीं (parameśvarīm) – supreme goddess (parama:supreme | īśvarīm:goddess); भगवतीं (bhagavatīm) – divine; बुद्धिप्रदां (buddhipradām) – granting intelligence (buddhi:intelligence | pradām:granting); शारदाम् (śāradām) – Sharada;
